com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl

Class TECancelRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.AbstractTERequest
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TECancelRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITERequest

    public class TECancelRequest
extends AbstractTERequest
    A cancel request is used to help the management cleanup the SUT Action dialog boxes on test case finish or on timeout when using the TTlibrary function timedMessageBox. Expects a TEResponse.OK as response.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITERequest

        ITERequest.Kind

      java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> getSutActionIds()
      Returns the list of SUT Action IDs that have been cancelled.

      • TECancelRequest

      • TECancelRequest

        public TECancelRequest(java.lang.String sessionId,
                       java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> sutActionIds)
        Create a cancel request for the given SUT Action IDs.
        Parameters:
        sutActionIds - if null kill all sut actions, close all dialogs

    • Method Detail

      • getSutActionIds

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> getSutActionIds()
        Returns the list of SUT Action IDs that have been cancelled.
